entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "Tanya saya soalan sebelum menjelaskan terlalu banyak."

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "Semak jawapan saya sebelum memberikan jawapan anda."

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Beri saya versi yang lebih sukar selepas saya mencuba."

entries.source: "Help me learn supply and demand"
entries.value: "Bantu saya belajar penawaran dan permintaan"

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Teks Keep it beginner friendly."

entries.source: "Teach me financial modeling"
entries.value: "Teach saya financial modeling"

entries.source: "Teach me Porter's Five Forces"
entries.value: "Teach saya Porter's Five Forces"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Gunakan contoh daripada peperiksaan, projek, atau kehidupan harian saya."

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: AI prompt

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Tanya untuk tiny pertama task.

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: End dengan recap anda tulis yourself.

entries.source: For Interactive Instruction, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Untuk Arahan Interaktif, gelung latihan yang berguna ialah:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Untuk ini mod, job ialah mudah: Belajar oleh doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, dan proving mastery. aplikasi builds langsung lesson canvas sekitar anda goal bukannya turning instruction menjadi long chat. Try: "Teach saya financial modeling."

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Asas

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Prompt yang baik biasanya merangkumi tiga perkara: subjek, tahap semasa anda, dan jenis bantuan yang anda mahu. Anda tidak memerlukan ayat yang sempurna. Anda hanya perlu memberi konteks yang cukup untuk memulakan sesi.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Jika response feels too luas, narrow ia. Tanya untuk one contoh, one salah tanggapan, one semak soalan, atau one seterusnya step. Jika ia feels too mudah, tanya untuk challenge. Jika ia feels too sukar, tanya untuk bridge daripada apa anda already know.

entries.source: Interactive Instruction prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompt dan gelung belajar untuk Arahan Interaktif

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Jadikan output lebih berguna

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Interactive Instruction on inspir.
entries.value: Prompt ideas dan repeatable gelung belajar untuk getting berguna pembelajaran results daripada Arahan Interaktif di inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Reading AI response bukan same as pembelajaran. Selepas pertama jawapan, tanya mod untuk jadikan anda lakukan something dengan idea.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: Laluan pembelajaran berkaitan

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Request feedback di part itu felt uncertain.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Respond sebelum asking untuk solution.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Mulakan dengan satu permintaan jelas

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: State goal dalam one sentence.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: belajar skills

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Itu akhir recap ialah important. Apabila anda jelaskan idea back, anda reveal apakah solid dan apakah still borrowed daripada AI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for interactive instruction with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Terbaik pembelajaran sessions ialah adjustable. Ini mod ialah tuned untuk Arahan Interaktif dengan nya own prompt, contoh, dan pembelajaran flow.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Interactive Instruction is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Cara terpantas mendapatkan nilai daripada Arahan Interaktif ialah memberi AI tugas pembelajaran, bukan sekadar topik. Topik menyatakan perkara yang anda minati. Tugas pembelajaran menyatakan jenis bantuan yang anda perlukan.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Kemudian tambah kekangan yang menjadikan sesi lebih peribadi:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: Cuba salah satu permulaan ini:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: Tukar mod menjadi latihan

entries.source: Use Interactive Instruction when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Collaborative Instruction. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Gunakan Arahan Interaktif apabila ini mod yang sesuai untuk tugas tersebut. Jika anda mahukan laluan berkaitan, cuba Arahan Kolaboratif. Anda juga boleh menyemak imbas blog pembelajaran AI untuk kaedah belajar, pembelajaran Sokratik, kad imbas, lakonan peranan, dan ingatan aktif.
